summary:
v3.4 (FableMultiAssets2) is the shipped v3 composition — 8 alpha sleeves in ONE cross-margined €10k IC Markets EU Raw account (ENGINE_MODEL="single") — mechanically re-levered from GLOBAL_SCALE 11 to 10 by a pre-registered rule ("pin scales {9,10,11}; ADOPT the SMALLEST with negQ≤1 AND CAGR≥85%; else keep 11" — s9 failed CAGR 79.4%<85, s11 failed negQ 2>1, s10 adopted). Sleeve weights are the F3 conviction caps (DOWNWARD-ONLY caps on the v1 frozen weights from docs/v2.0/F3_DURABILITY.md, breach 0.095 vs 0.329 frozen at scale 9): meanrev 0.110 (v1 0.140), carry_breakout 0.046, seasonal 0.180 (v1 0.247), intraday 0.168, crisis 0.100 (v1 0.139), trend_v2 0.042, crypto_smart 0.130 (v1 0.219), plus the v3 import mag_xau 0.050 (gold $100 round-number magnet from the NewStrategyFable5 hunt, sole survivor of a pre-registered 4-candidate gauntlet: 2015-19 OOS Sharpe 0.62, our-harness 1.25). Weights sum 0.826; the freed 0.174 is CASH-PARKED, never renormalized (OPS-8: renormalizing doubles ceiling-breach odds). Book construction (official): per-sleeve positions × raw weight × GLOBAL_SCALE(10), summed (ensemble.combine, NO renormalize), then ensemble.apply_hard_limits with gold_cap = structural_gold_cap = seasonal_weight × scale = 0.18×10 = 1.80×E on the COMBINED overnight XAUUSD column (hours ≥21 or <6 server; zero free constant — was 1.98×E at s11, 1.62×E at s9), and 0.5×E all-hours cap on EURCHF/EURSEK/EURNOK/AUDNZD. Both caps are stress-load-bearing: uncapped overnight gold stacks to 4.24×E and a −9% Monday gap marks −33.3% (capped: −17.7%); uncapped meanrev cross at s10 is 1.10×E and a −15% peg break reaches 18–23% (capped: 8.2–14.0%). Disclosed residual: intraday-session gold is UNCAPPED at 3.68×E.

Engine of record: research/core.py::account_engine_1m — 1-minute single cross-margined account, worst-mark intrabar M2M (eq_w: longs marked at bar low, shorts at bar high), real spread+commission+swap, one-bar execution lag, negY/negQ close-to-close M2M on full equity by calendar period. Official pin research/outputs/v34_s10_pin_1m.json (+ v34_s10_pin_curve.parquet), built by research/eval_v34_pin_s10.py, config_hash 48c09199fbf83d82: CAGR +88.66% / MaxDD worst-mark 21.67% / Sharpe 1.8543 / 0/6 negY / 1/24 negQ (2023Q1 −1.42%) / breach P(maxDD>30%) worst-mark 0.1208 (close-mark 0.0932; median resampled DD 23.4%, p95 33.5%) / €10k → €449,708, span 2020-01-02→2025-12-31. Every year positive (2020 +127.6, 2021 +136.6, 2022 +32.1, 2023 +76.9, 2024 +80.5, 2025 +86.7). Gates (core.compute_metrics["gates"], revised 2026-07-09: CAGR≥80% maximize-within-DD-budget, MaxDD<30% worst-mark, 0 negY, ≤1 negQ, Sharpe>2 nice-to-have non-blocking): 4/5 — only the non-blocking Sharpe misses, and Sharpe is leverage-invariant (~1.85 at every scale; frictionless book scores 2.248, the −0.388 execution drag loses the gate). Fitness F = Sharpe·(CAGR/MaxDD)·(1−negQ/24)·(1−ρ̄)·ψ with ψ=0.1 on any negative year. ALL numbers are in-sample: no post-2025 holdout exists; the demo is declared the falsification test.

The validation battery (tiered per docs/VALIDATION_METHODOLOGY.md, applied scorecard in VALIDATION.md): Tier 0 reproduction (pin bit-stable; v2-pin breach 0.078 reproduced on the same code path; hourly fast-sim vs 1m engine agree within ~7%-optimistic-CAGR/faithful-DD band); Tier 2 robustness — walk-forward expanding-window quarterly min-var refit OOS Sharpe 1.62 vs frozen 1.43 (113%, ROBUST), purged CPCV (8 blocks/2 test/10d embargo, 28 folds, ridge-cov min-var) p50 2.15, p5 1.03, p95 3.08, 100% folds>0 (min 0.66), 96%>1, per-sleeve DEV(≤2023-12-31)→HOLD(2024-25) one-shot with ≤6 free params/sleeve, 7/7 survivors FULL-positive, book 2015-19 pre-period one-shot Sharpe 0.93; Tier 3 — deflated Sharpe 0.394 at honest cumulative N≈474 trials (band 0.39–0.59; YELLOW, mitigated by correlated trials), breach via Politis-Romano stationary block bootstrap, 20-day mean blocks (house convention; the flattering 40-60d choice deliberately not used), 5000 paths, seed 20260709; Tier 4 — stress re-run on the final book (MKT-4 gold-bear 28.2% DD + −9% Monday −17.7% capped; MKT-3 joint p95-hour gap −28.1% worst, touches the −25% kill region, ×1.5 cliff 41.2%; MKT-8 peg break 8.2–14.0%; all PASS the 30% ceiling) and hardening (Kelly 0.15× full Kelly with L*=67.4×; slippage graceful: ×2 cost → 79.3%/1.65/23.9%, DD<30% even at ×3; margin p99 58.1%/max 78.1%, 90% cap never binds); Tier 5 diversification ENB 7.28/8 (corr) / 6.00/8 (cov), mean|corr| 0.088. The negQ story: negative quarters are vol-drag artifacts of leverage (drag ~scale²) — 2023Q1's real arithmetic loss was ~−69bp, booked −1.42% at s10 vs −2.63% at s11; intraday/crypto bled ~−17.7% offset by a crisis+meanrev rescue ~+16.3%; 2024Q2 flipped back green at s10. Only scale/vol moves negQ, never composition — which is why the scale lever owns that gate. Honest forward expectations: the pinned 1.85 Sharpe is flattered by the 2020-21 windfall (rolling Sharpe ~3.5/CAGR ~158%); durable 2022-25 regime is ~1.76/~76%; the disclosed forward band is Sharpe ~1.2–1.5 (PREPROD: "retired selection discount + MAG's OOS increment"; PERFORMANCE pins honest forward Sharpe ≈1.45, the daily-pin durable-regime number) with deliberately conservative forward CAGR — demo success is defined as staying inside the bootstrap p5–p95 band at ~1.2–1.5 realized Sharpe, NOT reproducing 88%.

One material code finding for the merge campaign: strategy_fable.py::build_portfolio_positions (line 127) computes contrib = sleeve_pos × (w/total) × GLOBAL_SCALE — i.e. it RENORMALIZES by the 0.826 weight sum (effective multiplier ×12.1), while the official pin builder (eval_v34_pin_s10.build_c2: E.combine(sleeves, raw_weights) × SCALE) and the live brain (ea/brain/target_engine.build_book, explicitly "combine(...)×SCALE, NO renormalize", measured bit-identical to the pin at 6.66e-16) use raw weights × 10. The strategy_fable path is only the fast-sim screening printer, but any new engine must copy the pin/brain convention, not build_portfolio_positions.
key_facts: OFFICIAL PIN (engine of record): research/outputs/v34_s10_pin_1m.json built by research/eval_v34_pin_s10.py on research/core.py::account_engine_1m (1m, single cross-margined €10k, worst-mark intrabar M2M, spread+commission+swap). CAGR +88.66% / DDworst 21.67% / Sharpe 1.8543 / 0negY / 1negQ (2023Q1 −1.42%) / breach worst-mark 0.1208, close-mark 0.0932 / €10k→€449,708. Span 2020-01-02→2025-12-31 (~6.0y). config_hash 48c09199fbf83d82.

SLEEVE_WEIGHTS (strategy_fable.py:60-74, F3 downward-only conviction caps on v1 frozen weights per docs/v2.0/F3_DURABILITY.md): meanrev 0.110 (v1 0.140), carry_breakout 0.046 (keep), seasonal 0.180 (v1 0.247, capped to 0.4-0.6 feed-honest edge), intraday 0.168 (keep), crisis 0.100 (v1 0.139), trend_v2 0.042 (keep), crypto_smart 0.130 (v1 0.219, institutionalization risk), mag_xau 0.050 (v3 import). Sum 0.826; freed 0.174 cash-parked, NEVER renormalized (OPS-8: renorm doubles ceiling-breach odds). F3 caps stress-validated: breach 0.095 capped vs 0.329 frozen at scale 9.

Per-sleeve profile (STRATEGY.md §2 + TRADE_CHARACTERISTICS.md): seasonal = gold NY→Asia overnight drift, XAUUSD, pays swap, standalone Sh 1.257, LOO +0.169, 456 t/yr, win 47.1%, PF 1.21, hold 6.9h, 100% long, 06:05 server hard-flat, magic 8400003. intraday = USA500/USTEC NY-open continuation, flat overnight (zero swap), TAKER always, Sh 0.92, LOO +0.14, 491 t/yr, 52.8% win, PF 1.21, 5.0h, 52.2% long, 21:05 hard-flat, magic 8400004. crypto_smart = BTC/ETH/SOL swap-asymmetric momentum, Sh 1.023, LOO +0.214, 160 t/yr, 75.6% win, PF 2.32, 13.3d, magic 8400007. meanrev = FX-cross z-reversion + index dip (trades EURCHF/EURSEK/EURNOK/AUDNZD), Sh 1.109, LOO +0.367 (#1), 185 t/yr, 44.1% win, PF 1.96, 12.2d, magic 8400001. crisis = stress-gated gold (gold>50dMA gate) + JPY snapback, Sh 0.516, LOO +0.004, 93 t/yr, PF 1.70, 49.6% long (most two-sided), magic 8400005. trend_v2 = lookback-ensemble TSMOM metals/energy, TAKER, Sh 0.383, LOO −0.025 (kept: tail-DD diversifier), 153 t/yr, 38.0% win, PF 1.24, magic 8400006. carry_breakout = FX carry gated by trend + commodity Donchian, 21 instruments, Sh 0.854, LOO +0.056, 724 t/yr, 72.5% win, PF 1.44, 18d hold, 98.6% long, magic 8400002. mag_xau = gold $100 round-number magnet, 17% active, lag-fragile (+1d lag halves edge), standalone 1.463 in DIAGNOSIS LOO table but 1.25 in STAT_REFRESH our-harness build (both cited), LOO +0.096, 24 t/yr, PF 2.31, 2.1d hold, 100% long, magic 8400008.

HARD LIMIT 1 (load-bearing, MKT-4): overnight |XAUUSD| ≤ seasonal_weight × scale = 0.18×10 = 1.80×E — a RULE not a constant (ensemble.structural_gold_cap, zero free constant; 1.98×E@s11, 1.62×E@s9), applied to the COMBINED XAU column (seasonal+mag_xau+crisis+trend_v2+carry), overnight = hours ≥21 or <6 server. Uncapped overnight stack maxes 4.24×E (worst bar 2020-07-17 22:00: seasonal 1.80 + crisis 1.00 + mag 0.965 + trend 0.37 + carry 0.11); −9% Monday gap = −33.3% uncapped vs −17.7% capped. Residual: INTRADAY gold uncapped at 3.68×E (worst 2022-02-26 17:00), ~−18% on a −5% mid-session drop — disclosed, future-version item.

HARD LIMIT 2 (load-bearing, MKT-8): |EURCHF|,|EURSEK|,|EURNOK|,|AUDNZD| ≤ 0.5×E at ALL hours (ensemble.apply_hard_limits cross_cap=0.5). Nominal meanrev cross at s10 = 0.11×10 = 1.10×E, so the cap binds below both scales; −15% peg break worst-DD-48 = 8.2–14.0% capped (worst AUDNZD 14.0%) vs 18–23% uncapped.

CASH-PARK RULE (OPS-8): on crypto delisting (or any sleeve kill/weight-halve), CASH-PARK the freed weight, never renormalize survivors. Sharpe-ladder shows cash-park drag is exactly 0 on Sharpe (renormalizing 0.826→1.0 leaves Sharpe unchanged; park costs CAGR only, recouped via GLOBAL_SCALE).

GLOBAL_SCALE=10 mechanics: single leverage knob; official book = Σ(sleeve_pos × raw_weight) × 10, then apply_hard_limits (eval_v34_pin_s10.py::build_c2 and ea/brain/target_engine.py::build_book — 'NO renormalize', measured bit-identical, max abs diff 6.66e-16). Sharpe leverage-invariant ~1.85 at every scale; leverage is a slider not an edge (F invariant, VALIDATION_METHODOLOGY §6). WARNING: strategy_fable.py::build_portfolio_positions:127 uses w/total (renormalizes by 0.826, effective ×12.1) — fast-sim screening printer only, NOT the official construction.

SCALE FRONTIER (RESULT.md): s9 CAGR 79.4/DD 19.9/Sh 1.88/negQ 1/breach 0.061/cap 1.62×E — fails CAGR≥85; s10 88.7/21.7/1.85/1/0.121/1.80×E — ADOPTED; s11 99.9/23.2/1.86/2/0.198/1.98×E (€636,090) — fails negQ. Pre-registered rule (PREREGISTRATION.md, verbatim): 'Pin scales {9,10,11}. ADOPT the SMALLEST scale with negQ ≤ 1 AND CAGR ≥ 85%. If none satisfies both, KEEP scale 11.' Pins: s9 outputs/c2_pin_1m.json, s11 outputs/c2_s11_pin_1m.json.

GATES (core.compute_metrics['gates'], revised 2026-07-09): CAGR ≥ 80% (maximize within DD budget) · MaxDD < 30% worst-mark · negY 0/6 · negQ ≤ 1/24 · Sharpe > 2.0 (nice-to-have, NON-blocking). v3.4 scores 4/5 (Sharpe 1.854 ✗). Evaluated on the pin equity curve: DD on worst intrabar mark eq_w (longs@bar-low bid_l, shorts@bar-high ask_h); negY/negQ close-to-close M2M on full equity incl. open positions, by calendar year/quarter. Fitness F = Sharpe·(CAGR/MaxDD)·(1−negQ/24)·(1−ρ̄)·ψ, ψ=0.1 if any negative year. 2026-07-09 revision: DD budget 20%→30%, CAGR floor 85%→80% (older run_v1_1.py still carries 85/20). v3.4's internal re-pick bar was CAGR≥85%.

VALIDATION BATTERY: WF = expanding window, quarterly long-only min-var refit over 8 daily streams, OOS Sharpe 1.62 vs frozen 1.43 (113%, ROBUST; v1.4-era 1.47/1.36). Purged CPCV = 8 blocks/2 test/10d embargo, 28 combinatorial folds, ridge-cov min-var: p5 1.03/p50 2.15/p95 3.08, 100% folds>0 (min 0.66, max 3.46), 96%>1. DSR = 0.394 at honest cumulative trial ledger N≈474 (200 v1 design → +258 engine tests=458 → +12 v3=470 → +4 v3.x=474; DSR 0.592→0.394; E[maxSR|null]=1.95 vs observed 1.85; YELLOW; trials heavily correlated so true DSR at upper band 0.39–0.59; matches AUDIT_REDTEAM 0.33–0.55; MAG adds exactly 1 trial). Breach bootstrap = Politis-Romano stationary block, 20-day MEAN blocks (house convention; 40-60d flattering choice NOT used), 5000 paths, seed 20260709, on daily-resampled pin curve with worst/close dip factor. Pre-period OOS: per-sleeve DEV(≤2023-12-31, ≤6 free params)→HOLD(2024-25) one-shot, 7/7 survivors FULL-positive; book 2015-19 one-shot Sharpe 0.93, 6/7 sleeves positive; 2 of 9 sleeve families killed on evidence.

STRESS (research/stress_v34.py → outputs/stress/v34_MKT-{3,4,8}.json, re-run on final s10 book, v2 baselines reproduced byte-for-byte): MKT-4 gold-bear year (2013 path net −28.4% on 2021 container, crisis gold leg forced off) DD 28.2% (<30, thin 1.8pp margin) + −9% Monday 01:00 gap, spread×5: −17.7% capped / −33.3% uncapped. MKT-3 joint gap at p95 margin hour (gold −6%, crypto −20%, indices −5%, JPY −4% against held sign, spreads ×5 for 12h, 48 bars): worst −28.1% at ×1.0 (gross 8.16×E, touches −25% kill region; no cascade, no stop-out, cap-slip 0.00%; ×1.5 cliff 41.2%). MKT-8 −15% peg break (spread ×20, no fill gap bar): worst-DD-48 8.2–14.0%. All 3 PASS the 30% ceiling.

HARDENING (research/run_v34_hardening.py → outputs/v34_hardening.json, HOURLY fast-sim, baseline CAGR 97.0/Sh 1.89/DD 22.2 — hotter than 1m pin, relative deliverables only): Kelly 0.15× full Kelly (L*=67.4×; scale-1 μ +5.4%/σ 2.8%/Sh 1.90; DD-constrained not Kelly-constrained). Slippage ×1.5→87.9%/1.77/23.0; ×2→79.3%/1.65/23.9; ×3→63.2%/1.40/25.6 — DD<30% even at 3×, ~2× headroom, no cliff. Margin p50 31.4/p95 51.9/p99 58.1/max 78.1%; >60% de-gross guard fires 0.61% of hours; 90% hard cap 0.00%; gross p50 4.22×/p95 6.92×/max 10.43×.

QUARTERLY-CONSISTENCY LOGIC (1/24 negQ): negQ are vol-drag artifacts of leverage (drag ~scale²), fixable ONLY by scale/vol, never by alpha/composition (CANON caveat 3). 2023Q1 real arithmetic drift ~−69bp, booked −1.42% at s10 vs −2.63% at s11; chop quarter: intraday/crypto bled ~−17.7%, crisis+meanrev rescued ~+16.3%. 2024Q2 green at s10 (was the second negQ at s11). The scale lever owns the negQ gate — that is the entire rationale for v3.4.

DIVERSIFICATION: mean pairwise |corr| 0.088; ENB 7.28/8 (correlation participation) vs 6.00/8 (vol-weighted covariance — mag_xau most variance-redundant, shares seasonal+crisis gold beta); non-dominant-PC variance 78%. LOO: dropping any of 7 sleeves keeps gates; dropping trend_v2 FAILS (v3.1 DECLINE 1/5 bars: CAGR 97.0/DD 25.5/Sh 1.864/negQ 2/breach 0.222; 2022Q1 flips negative without its +810bp).

v3.x LEVER CHAIN: v3.1 drop trend_v2 = DECLINE; v3.2 maker-first = ACCEPT config-only demo-gated (InpMakerFirst=false default; modeled 91.7% spread-leg reduction @T=60 is an UPPER bound, queue unmodelled, conservative floor ~22%; hybrid: all sleeves maker except intraday which stays TAKER — resting limits adversely selected −2136bp·E despite 97.5% touch; forced exits always taker); v3.3 xsec_reversion@0.03 chop insurance = DECLINE (helps 2015-16, hurts 2018-19); v3.4 scale 11→10 = ADOPT. Composition frozen after v3.0.

SHARPE DECOMPOSITION LADDER (DIAGNOSIS S2): uncorrelated-ideal 2.826 → correlation drag −0.228 → 2.598 → weights suboptimality −0.350 → frictionless linear 2.248 → cash drag −0.000 → 1m execution drag −0.388 → realized 1.86. Frictionless book clears the Sharpe-2 gate; execution loses it. ~19,907-trade cost realism.

FORWARD EXPECTATIONS (honest): 2020-21 windfall rolling Sharpe ~3.5 / CAGR ~158%, ann vol 27.3%; durable 2022-25 Sharpe ~1.76 / CAGR ~76%, vol 30.2%. Honest forward Sharpe ≈1.45 (PERFORMANCE: 'daily-pin durable-regime number'); disclosed forward band ~1.2–1.5 (PREPROD §1: 'retired selection discount + MAG's OOS increment'; VALIDATION banner and DEMO §5.1 both use 1.2–1.5). Demo success = live equity inside bootstrap p5–p95 at ~1.2–1.5 realized Sharpe, NOT 88% CAGR. Chop-fragility: Sharpe 0.76 in chop vs 2.31 in trend; only meanrev/intraday chop-positive.

GUARDS: 54 live guards (20 market / 24 ops / 10 durability) in research/outputs/guards_config.json (source docs/v2.0/F3_DURABILITY.md). Kill triggers (fire = release weight to CASH, never redistribute): DUR-seasonal (12-mo net Sh<−0.5 AND pre-cost overnight 23:00-06:00 drift≤0), DUR-crypto_smart (24-mo Sh<0), DUR-intraday (24-mo Sh<−0.25 AND open-drive corr≤0), DUR-meanrev (Sh<−0.4; structural: |z|>4 non-reversion 10d / regime change suspends cross), DUR-crisis (Sh<−0.8; 2 consecutive negative gate-active episodes), DUR-trend_v2 (Sh<−0.3), DUR-carry_breakout (Sh<−0.3; <2 pairs clearing 0.5%/yr net 126d suspends carry leg). mag_xau: PREPROD §5.4 says NO DUR guard exists (live blocker); DEMO.md/VALIDATION say DUR-mag_xau-sharpe (trailing-24m Sh<0→kill) + DUR-mag_xau-drift (rolling-20-trade capture <0.5× modeled→alert, <0.25×→kill-review; calibrate on first 60 demo trades) are NOW REGISTERED — DEMO is the later doc. Ops: OPS-9a −25% flatten-and-halt (2 marks 5min apart, human RESUME only); OPS-6b equity floor <€8k → de-scale preserving ratios; OPS-2a/2b/2c forced exits 21:05 intraday / 06:05 seasonal; OPS-3b seasonal slippage bars: green ≤0.8bp 20-day rolling one-side (edge dies at 1.4bp), >1.5bp halve seasonal, >3bp kill review; MKT-3a 60% margin de-gross / 45% Friday.

EA/RECONCILIATION: reconcile-don't-recompute (Python brain computes signals once; MQL5 executor diffs and executes only, re-clips limits as defense-in-depth). config_hash 48c09199fbf83d82 over {schema, scale, sorted weights}; EA rejects mismatched targets. Magic band 8400001–8400008 (meanrev, carry_breakout, seasonal, intraday, crisis, trend_v2, crypto_smart, mag_xau); HEDGING account required; 4 sleeves share XAUUSD. 6095 unit tests (6001 volume fuzz + 29 volume + 20 guards + 18 targets protocol + 11 reconcile + 16 hard limits). A.4 headless parity (research/reconcile_ea_v34.py → outputs/recon_ea_v34.json): brain book vs pin max abs diff 6.66e-16 over 49,379×31 cells; 0/710,935 unexplained volume mismatches; 100% direction; 100% P&L retention (pin reproduced to 15 sig figs); notional retention 97.75% (91.3% 2020 €10k → 99.41% 2025 €400k+). MT5 real-tick parity OPEN — demo-only. Verdict chain: VALIDATION 'VALIDATED IN-SAMPLE — CONDITIONAL GO for demo'; PREPROD 'CONDITIONAL GO'.

DEMO green-light (≥3 months, RUNBOOK §8): seasonal slippage ≤0.8bp 20d rolling; fill rate ≥98%; forced exits every session; zero unexplained HALT_FLATTEN; equity in bootstrap p5–p95 at ~1.2–1.5 Sharpe; volume_rejects==0; reconcile integrity clean; watchdog uptime ≥99%. Maker-first activation per sleeve: fill rate ≥70% in 60-min horizon AND net spread-leg saving >0; intraday never flips. Decision rules: drift → step scale DOWN toward 9 preserving ratios; better-than-backtest → do NOT step scale up (s11 fails negQ).

ENGINE DISCIPLINE (VALIDATION_METHODOLOGY): two-tier — hourly core.simulate for search (~60× faster, ~7% CAGR-optimistic, worst-mark DD faithful/slightly conservative), 1m account_engine_1m confirms the final pick only. Causality: one-bar exec lag (pos[t] earns t+1); daily→hourly stamped d+1 00:00; 1m holds hour-h target over h+1 minutes; no full-sample normalizations (only fixed ±30% bad-tick winsorization); truncation test requires bit-identical positions; lag-stress: >40% Sharpe collapse on +1 bar = non-robust; adversarial audit by non-author; ±30% parameter perturbation sensitivity.
architecture: Single cross-margined account (ENGINE_MODEL="single"), 8 alpha sleeves sharing one margin pool and one worst-mark accounting engine — no per-sleeve sub-accounts. Signal path (single source of truth): research/sleeves/* modules + research/ext_import/mag_xau.py overlay each emit an hourly fraction-of-equity position matrix per instrument → ensemble.combine(sleeves, raw SLEEVE_WEIGHTS) × GLOBAL_SCALE(10) with NO weight renormalization (weights sum 0.826, freed 0.174 cash-parked) → ensemble.structural_gold_cap(weights, scale) = seasonal 0.18 × 10 = 1.80×E → ensemble.apply_hard_limits(pos, gold_cap=1.80, cross_cap=0.5) clipping the COMBINED overnight XAUUSD column (hours ≥21 or <6 server) and the four managed crosses at all hours. Confirmation engine: research/core.py::account_engine_1m (1-minute bars, worst-mark intrabar M2M eq_w, spread+commission+swap, one-bar execution lag, 90% margin cap that never binds); screening engine: hourly core.simulate (fast-sim, ~7% CAGR-optimistic). Live stack mirrors this exactly: ea/brain/target_engine.py::build_book (raw weight × scale, no renormalize — measured bit-identical to the pin at 6.66e-16) emits targets.json (schema fable.targets.v1, seq-monotonic, config_hash 48c09199fbf83d82 over {schema, scale, sorted weights}); the MQL5 executor (ea/mql5/FableExecutor.mq5) never re-derives signals — it diffs targets vs live broker positions per (symbol, magic 8400001–8400008), normalizes volume through one shared reference path, re-enforces the hard limits, and executes deltas; a watchdog on a second host monitors heartbeats. 54 live guards (20 market / 24 ops / 10 durability) in research/outputs/guards_config.json.
how_to_run: python3 /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/research/eval_v34_pin_s10.py — rebuilds the official pin research/outputs/v34_s10_pin_1m.json + v34_s10_pin_curve.parquet; expected bit-stable CAGR 88.66% / DDworst 21.67% / Sharpe 1.8543 / 0 negY / 1 negQ / €449,708; it first reproduces the v2-pin breach 0.078 as a harness-drift check; breach bootstrap seed 20260709, 5000 paths, 20d blocks.

python3 /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/strategy_fable.py — prints fast-sim DEV/HOLD/FULL screening summary (CAUTION: this path renormalizes weights by w/total; official numbers do not come from it).
python3 -m pytest /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/ea/tests/ -q — expected 6095 passing (6001 = volume fuzz grid).
python3 /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/ea/brain/target_engine.py --dry-run — emits brain target positions without placing orders (mandatory pre-deploy sanity step).
python3 /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/ea/brain/brain_config.py — prints live config_hash (expect 48c09199fbf83d82), gold cap 1.80×E, MAGIC_OF map 8400001–8400008.
python3 /Users/dsalamanca/vs_env/FableMultiAssets2/research/stat_refresh_mag.py — regenerates outputs/stat_refresh_mag.json (WF 1.62/1.43, CPCV p50 2.15, DSR 0.394@N≈474, ENB 7.28/6.00).

official_numbers: Engine of record: research/core.py::account_engine_1m — 1-minute, single cross-margined €10k IC Markets EU Raw account, worst-mark intrabar M2M (longs marked at bar low, shorts at bar high), full spread+commission+swap cost model, one-bar execution lag. Official pin: research/outputs/v34_s10_pin_1m.json (+ v34_s10_pin_curve.parquet), built by research/eval_v34_pin_s10.py against strategy_fable.py (GLOBAL_SCALE=10.0, config_hash 48c09199fbf83d82). Headline: CAGR +88.66% · MaxDD (worst-mark) 21.67% · Sharpe 1.8543 · 0/6 negative years · 1/24 negative quarters (2023Q1 −1.42%) · P(maxDD>30%) worst-mark 0.1208 / close-mark 0.0932 (Politis-Romano stationary bootstrap, 20-day mean blocks, 5000 paths, seed 20260709; median DD 23.4%, p95 33.5%) · €10k → €449,708 · span 2020-01-02 → 2025-12-31. Per-year: 2020 +127.6%, 2021 +136.6%, 2022 +32.1%, 2023 +76.9%, 2024 +80.5%, 2025 +86.7%. Gates 4/5 (Sharpe>2 nice-to-have missed at 1.854, leverage-invariant). ALL in-sample — no post-2025 holdout; disclosed forward expectation is Sharpe ~1.2–1.5 (honest ≈1.45), not the pinned 1.85/88%. Predecessor comparator: v3 s11 pin outputs/c2_s11_pin_1m.json (99.9%/23.2%/1.86/2 negQ/0.198/€636,090).
pitfalls: strategy_fable.py::build_portfolio_positions (line 127) RENORMALIZES: contrib = pos × (w/total) × GLOBAL_SCALE (total=0.826 → effective ×12.1). The official pin (eval_v34_pin_s10.build_c2) and live brain (target_engine.build_book) use raw weight × 10 with NO renormalization. Never copy the strategy_fable fast-sim path into a new engine — it silently violates the cash-park principle.

strategy_fable.py comment drift (v2-era comments never updated): line 57 says 'freed 0.224 is cash-parked' (7-sleeve v2 sum 0.776; actual v3.4 is 0.174/0.826); line 78 shows gold cap '0.18*9 = 1.62x' (actual shipped 0.18×10=1.80); lines 88-98 carry an OLD pre-MAG scale frontier ('scale 9 → 106% CAGR / 23.5% DD') that contradicts the v3.4 frontier (s9 = 79.4%/19.9% — different book: v2 7-sleeve vs v3.4 8-sleeve). Trust the v3.4 line-104-110 comment and the docs, not the older comment blocks.

mag_xau standalone Sharpe appears as 1.463 (DIAGNOSIS LOO table, quoted in STRATEGY/PERFORMANCE/VALIDATION) and 1.25 (STAT_REFRESH 'our-harness' build, strategy_fable.py comment, DEMO fingerprint) — two different measurement recipes, both officially cited; do not treat as a discrepancy to 'fix'.

MAG kill-trigger contradiction: PREPROD.md §5.4/§6 says mag_xau has NO DUR-* guard (BLOCKER for live); DEMO.md §1/§5.3 and VALIDATION sign-off say DUR-mag_xau-sharpe + DUR-mag_xau-drift are 'now registered' in guards_config.json. DEMO/VALIDATION are the later state; PREPROD documents the pre-registration snapshot. VALIDATION §5 OPEN list also still says 'no DUR-* guard' — internal doc lag.

Known stale docs (disclosed in RECONCILIATION §Honest caveats): ea/RUNBOOK.md §1.2 carries legacy 7-sleeve magic map 920001–920007 (authoritative: PROTOCOL §3, 8400001–8400008) and §4 says gold cap 1.0×E (actual structural 1.80×E); ea/tests/README.md says '94 tests' (actual 6095); EA_MONITORING_SPEC.md §3 says crypto-delisting 're-normalized weights' (code/SPEC/tests say CASH-PARK, never renormalize); RUNBOOK §5 has a 'GLOBAL_SCALE 9→7' equity-floor line needing reconciliation to scale 10.

Stale bridge artifacts: ea/bridge/targets.json / reconcile_report.json / guard_report.json on disk were generated at scale 9, hash 3b96c9988d1a8293, gold cap 1.0/1.62 — they PREDATE the scale-10 re-pick and are exactly what the hash guard rejects. Regenerate at deploy; do not read them as reconciled state.

Hardening numbers run on the HOURLY fast-sim (baseline CAGR 97.0% vs 1m pin 88.66%) — absolute levels are indicative only; only relative degradation (slippage) and leverage/margin framing are deliverables. Similarly the hourly engine is ~7% CAGR-optimistic overall.

Trade counts in TRADE_CHARACTERISTICS are an UPPER BOUND (FIFO on the hourly position path counts every position-reducing bar; a real EA nets partial rebalances). The shape (win%, PF, hold, long%) is the deliverable, not the counts.

Things already tried and killed: v3.1 dropping trend_v2 (DECLINE — LOO looks negative but removal worsens DD 23.2→25.5, breach→0.222, flips 2022Q1 negative); v3.3 xsec_reversion@0.03 chop insurance (DECLINE — conditional not general: helps 2015-16, hurts 2018-19); every Sharpe avenue to clear the 2.0 gate (allocation v1.2, alpha v1.3/v1.6, regime timing, external import v3.0) was exhausted and declined — Sharpe is leverage-invariant, capped by execution drag (−0.388).

Do NOT scale up on good live performance — pre-committed rule: scale 10 is the ceiling (s11 fails negQ); upside is not a mandate for leverage. Conversely negQ cannot be fixed by composition changes, only scale/vol.

Disclosed unresolved residuals: intraday gold uncapped at 3.68×E (~−18% on a −5% mid-session gold shock — the next hard-limit gap); MKT-3 base episode touches the −25% kill region at s10 (kill halts after the one-bar mark, cannot prevent it); MKT-4 bear-year margin only 1.8pp; ×1.5 joint-gap cliff = 41.2%.

Everything is in-sample 2020-25: the DEV/HOLD split was consumed in the v1 program and v3.x re-used the same span; no post-2025 holdout exists; DSR 0.394 at honest N≈474 is a standing yellow flag; the 2020-21 windfall inflates the headline (durable regime Sharpe ~1.76). Judge any merged book against the forward band ~1.2–1.5, not 1.85.
